title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗协议将“让石油流动！”原油价格暴跌
summary: Oil sank after the US and Iran agreed to an interim deal to end their months-long war, potentially allowing the Strait of Hormuz to reopen and easing a supply crunch that has rattled global energy markets.

title: Swiss Pragmatism Holds as Disputed Population Cap Rejected
title_cn: 瑞士实用主义依然存在，有争议的人口上限被拒绝
summary: Swiss voters opted to play it safe on Sunday, rejecting an unprecedented proposal to cap the country’s population at 10 million people as economic risks overcame elevated concerns about immigration.

title: Billionaire Gina Rinehart Made ‘Significant’ SpaceX Investment
title_cn: 亿万富翁吉娜·莱因哈特对 SpaceX 进行了“重大”投资
summary: Australia’s richest person Gina Rinehart said she made “a significant investment” in SpaceX, as her mining company laid out ambitions to work with Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite company.

title: Shipowners Seek Clarity on Hormuz Deal as Waiting Flotillas Grow
title_cn: 随着等待船队的增加，船东寻求霍尔木兹协议的明确性
summary: A US-Iran deal intended to reopen the Strait of Hormuz within days has been met with caution by shipowners and traders, with almost all saying they would need more details in order to assess whether safe transits are possible after months of false starts.

title: Inflation Worries Keep Markets Wary Even After Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 即使在伊朗和平协议达成后，通胀担忧仍令市场保持警惕
summary: Bonds and stocks rallied on Monday after a US-Iran interim deal eased nerves, though market participants warned against celebrating too soon as the conflict’s economic fallout remains unresolved.

title: London Gold Market Weighs Earlier Auction to Suit Asian Traders
title_cn: 伦敦黄金市场考虑提前拍卖以适应亚洲交易者
summary: The London Bullion Market Association is considering moving its morning gold auction to an earlier time to accommodate traders in Asia.

title: Global Funds Retreat From Japan’s Long Bonds on Slow BOJ
title_cn: 由于日本央行行动缓慢，全球资金从日本长期债券撤退
summary: Little more than a year after Japan finally offered yields high enough to lure global fund managers back to its government bond market, many are starting to retreat.

title: Eyre: US Iran Deal Will Not Lead to a new Middle East
title_cn: 艾尔：美国伊朗协议不会导致新中东
summary: US and Iran have reached an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz paving the way for talks on Tehran's nuclear program and an end to a war that has engulfed the Middle East. Alan Eyre, Former Senior US Diplomat and Distinguished Diplomatic Fellow at Middle East Institute spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on what this deal will bring to the region. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What the US-Iran Peace Deal Means for the Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 美伊和平协议对霍尔木兹海峡意味着什么
summary: No region of the world produces more oil and gas than the countries straddling the Persian Gulf. Most of this energy can only be exported aboard tankers that cross the Strait of Hormuz — a waterway that’s effectively been closed for more than three months since the US and Israel started a war against Iran in late February.

title: How the IMF's Kristalina Georgieva Hires Top Talent
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织的克里斯塔利娜·格奥尔基耶娃如何聘用顶尖人才
summary: IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva tells Francine Lacqua the interview question she asks every candidate, reflects on a career setback that ultimately changed her life, and shares what keeps her up at night as she prepares for the next global shock. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: K-Content Powerhouse JoongAng Group Seeks Court Rehabilitation
title_cn: 韩国内容巨头中央集团寻求法院平反
summary: The holding company of South Korea’s JoongAng Group, a sprawling media conglomerate and K-Content powerhouse behind hits like Netflix smash Culinary Class Wars, filed for court rehabilitation, signaling a deepening liquidity crunch.

title: US and Iran Reach Deal to Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国和伊朗达成协议重新开放霍尔木兹
summary: The US and Iran said they reached an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, halting a war that killed thousands of people and setting the stage for 60 days of negotiations on the fate of Tehran’s nuclear program. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rally With Bonds as Iran Deal Spurs Relief: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 伊朗协议刺激救济，股市随债券上涨：市场总结
summary: Global stocks and bonds rallied while oil slumped to a three-month low after the US and Iran reached a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, sparking a relief rally across markets as concerns over energy-supply disruptions eased.

title: Treasuries Rally as Traders Trim Fed Hike Bets After Iran Deal
title_cn: 伊朗协议后，交易员削减美联储加息押注，国债上涨
summary: Treasuries advanced across the curve as investors dialed back expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes following news of a deal to halt the Iran war.

title: Philippines’ Marcos Calls for Special Congress Session Amid Deadlock
title_cn: 菲律宾马科斯呼吁在僵局中召开特别国会会议
summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. called Congress to a special session on June 17 to pass priority legislative measures, hoping lawmakers will set aside political distractions.

title: Hormuz Halt Forces Middle East Trade Into Huge Rewiring
title_cn: 霍尔木兹封锁迫使中东贸易进行大规模重组
summary: In the wake of the 12-day US-Israel and Iran war a year ago, Siemens Energy AG sent a person driving from Saudi Arabia’s Red Sea port of Jeddah across the Arabian peninsula to the industrial hub of Dammam to study an alternative route in case the crucial Strait of Hormuz was shut down.

title: Cement, Textile Stocks Biggest Winners From Pakistan Budget
title_cn: 水泥、纺织股成为巴基斯坦预算的最大赢家
summary: The government’s move to lower taxes on certain sectors including cement and textiles is likely to support related shares as Pakistan looks to balance growth and compliance with its promises to the International Monetary Fund.

title: LBMA Says Gold's Status as a Safe Haven Still Holds
title_cn: 伦敦金银市场协​​会 (LBMA) 表示黄金的避风港地位仍然成立
summary: London Bullion Market Association CEO Ruth Crowell thinks the narrative of gold's status as a safe haven still holds. She adds that it's important to measure safe haven status in years rather than weeks or months. She speaks with Paul Allen on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lubrizol Aims to Double India Rev. Over Next 5 Years
title_cn: 路博润的目标是在未来 5 年内将印度收入翻一番
summary: Lubrizol Corp. President & CEO Rebecca Liebert expects to double its revenues in India over the next five years, and says the company has put a lot of investment in this market to enable that growth. She speaks with Paul Allen on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Failed SpaceX IPO Allocation Prompts Korea to Widen Mirae Review
title_cn: SpaceX IPO分配失败促使韩国扩大未来审查范围
summary: South Korea’s financial watchdog has expanded an inspection of Mirae Asset Securities Co. to examine the brokerage’s failure to secure an allocation of SpaceX shares in the company’s initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: LNG Tanker Heads Toward Hormuz as Deal Lifts Reopening Hopes
title_cn: 液化天然气油轮驶向霍尔木兹，协议解除了重新开启的希望
summary: A liquefied natural gas tanker that has been trapped in the Persian Gulf for over three months appears to be heading toward the Strait of Hormuz, just as the US and Iran say they have reached a deal to reopen the waterway.

title: Warsh Is Inheriting a Rates-Mountain Breakdown
title_cn: 沃什正在继承利率山的崩溃
summary: We’re going from a steady descent on interest rates to a potentially wild ride.

title: Stock Market Moves On From SpaceX to Focus on Iran Deal, Fed
title_cn: 美联储：股市从 SpaceX 转向关注伊朗交易
summary: After SpaceX and its bankers pulled off the largest-ever IPO without a hitch last week, investors are returning their focus back to Earth.

title: CSIS' Cahill on US-Iran Deal Impact on Energy
title_cn: CSIS 的卡希尔谈美伊协议对能源的影响
summary: Ben Cahill, non-resident senior associate for the Energy Security and Climate Change Program at CSIS, says even though the US and Iran were able to come to an agreement to halt the ongoing war and reopen the strait of Hormuz, energy markets "are not quite out of the woods yet", and there is still room for prices to run up even after the MOU is signed. He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'Proud Moment for Pakistan': Finance Minister on US-Iran Agreement
title_cn: “巴基斯坦的骄傲时刻”：财政部长谈美伊协议
summary: Pakistani Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb speaks with Bloomberg Television about the "critical role" his country has played in facilitating an interim agreement between the US and Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pakistan Says It's in 'Very Good Place on Fiscal Side'
title_cn: 巴基斯坦称其“财政状况非常好”
summary: Pakistan Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb believes the country is in a 'very good place on the fiscal side'. He speaks with Paul Allen on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rally, Oil Falls on Long-Awaited Iran Peace Deal | The Asia Trade 6/15/2026
title_cn: 期待已久的伊朗和平协议推动股市上涨，油价下跌亚洲贸易 6/15/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea, US Agree Cooperation on Won Weakness, Seoul Official Says
title_cn: 首尔官员表示，韩美就韩元疲弱问题达成合作协议
summary: South Korea and the US agreed to maintain close cooperation in addressing the won’s weakness, according to Korea’s top foreign-exchange official.

title: US and Iran Reach Deal to Halt the War, Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国和伊朗达成协议停止战争并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
summary: The US and Iran reached an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, halting a war that killed thousands of people and setting the stage for negotiations on the fate of Iran's nuclear program. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Rises After US and Iran Agree Deal That Would Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意重新开放霍尔木兹海峡后金价上涨
summary: Gold rose after the US and Iran announced an interim deal to end hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, easing global inflation fears and potentially tempering expectations for interest-rate hikes.

title: Hong Kong’s Leader Dodges Questions on Potential Second Term
title_cn: 香港领导人回避有关潜在第二任期的问题
summary: Hong Kong Chief Executive John Lee remained non-committal about seeking a second term, deflecting questions regarding his political future ahead of the city’s leadership selection next year.

title: South African Firms Face Pressure Due to Anti-Immigrant Protests
title_cn: 南非公司因反移民抗议而面临压力
summary: South African companies with operations across Africa are facing mounting pressure as anti-immigrant protests in the continent’s largest economy trigger diplomatic tensions and calls for action against their businesses.

title: Anthropic Block Marks US Reversal, Warning to Silicon Valley
title_cn: 人择区块标志着美国的逆转，对硅谷的警告
summary: The extraordinary move by the US to bar foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s best AI models underscores the Trump administration’s newfound willingness to exert control over a pivotal industry. It also reminds Silicon Valley that it’s working with an imperfectly understood technology with uncertain impact.

title: Macron’s G7 Legacy Hangs on Fickle AI Funding and Data Centers
title_cn: 马克龙的七国集团遗产取决于变化无常的人工智能资金和数据中心
summary: With less than a year left in office, Emmanuel Macron wants to be remembered as the French president who put Europe back in the technology race.

title: 新SiriはアップルAI危機を救えるか、実機を試して見えた7つの改善例－Power On
title_cn: 新的 Siri 能否拯救苹果的人工智能危机？实际设备测试后发现的 7 项改进 - 开机
summary: アップルの新Siriは2年遅れで登場したものの、実用性が十分な水準に達し、AI戦略立て直しの足掛かりとなりつつある。

title: Top Banks Rush to Fill Chief AI Roles as Talent Jumps to Rivals
title_cn: 随着人才涌向竞争对手，顶级银行纷纷填补首席人工智能职位
summary: Banks from Sydney to London are racing to fill the senior role of chief AI officer, a job that barely existed a year ago. Those in the position, however, say it might not be around for long.

title: Activist Palliser Urges Taiwan Firm WUS to Privatize, Lift Value
title_cn: 活动人士 Palliser 敦促台湾公司 WUS 私有化，提升价值
summary: Activist hedge fund Palliser Capital is urging Taiwanese company WUS Printed Circuit Co. to enhance shareholder value, including through a potential privatization, according to documents viewed by Bloomberg News.

title: Jack Ma-Backed Ant Group Set for High-Stakes Overhaul of Billion-User App
title_cn: 马云支持的蚂蚁集团将对数十亿用户的应用程序进行高风险的改革
summary: Ant Group Co. is testing an overhaul to its Alipay super app that would introduce an AI agent interface, a major escalation in its battle for users with archrival WeChat.

title: South Korea’s Floundering Movie Business Turns to AI for Help
title_cn: 韩国陷入困境的电影业向人工智能求助
summary: Two films built largely with generative AI tools are on view in South Korean theaters

title: Carney Says Anthropic Ban Shows Risk of Relying on Big AI Models
title_cn: 卡尼表示人为禁令显示了依赖大人工智能模型的风险
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said the US export ban blocking all foreign access to Anthropic PBC’s latest artificial intelligence models underscores the risk of depending on just a handful of powerful AI tools.

title: Apple’s New Siri Is Just Good Enough to Ease Its AI Crisis
title_cn: 苹果的新 Siri 足以缓解人工智能危机
summary: The company prepares for the foldable iPhone and touch-screen MacBook.

title: Crypto Token’s 50% Wipeout Shows Magnitude of AI-Hacking Threat
title_cn: 加密代币 50% 被销毁显示人工智能黑客威胁的严重性
summary: When Eli Ben-Sasson helped create the Zcash cryptocurrency nearly a decade ago, the cryptographer worried about human adversaries. He didn’t expect that machine intelligence would one day expose a flaw that had eluded years of expert human judgment.

title: How Google Is Reinventing Search with AI
title_cn: 谷歌如何利用人工智能重塑搜索
summary: Google is making the biggest change to its search business in more than two decades, integrating AI-generated answers, conversational search, and reasoning tools directly into the heart of its search product, which has shaped the course of content and the internet.. Nick Fox, Google’s Senior Vice President of Knowledge and Information, argues that AI allows users to ask more complex questions and get faster, more useful answers while still connecting people to content across the web. But, for creators and publishers, fewer keystrokes could make a difference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Turns Coders, Lawyers and Analysts Into Ghosts of London’s Past
title_cn: 人工智能将程序员、律师和分析师变成伦敦过去的幽灵
summary: Search for “finance analyst” and you’re likely to find around 80 vacancies in London, according to a prominent recruitment website. If that seems like a surprisingly low number for one of the world’s biggest banking and corporate hubs, it’s because it is — four years earlier, the same website featured more than 350 of these roles.

title: UK to Announce Social Media Ban for Teens This Week, Nandy Says
title_cn: 南迪说，英国本周将宣布青少年社交媒体禁令
summary: A UK ban on under-16s using social media set to be unveiled this week is not “a silver bullet” but will have “a significant role to play” in keeping children safe, Culture Secretary Lisa Nandy told Sky News on Sunday.

title: SpaceX Surge Further Boosts Saudi Billionaire Prince’s Fortune
title_cn: SpaceX 的激增进一步增加了沙特亿万富翁王子的财富
summary: Friday’s debut share surge for SpaceX is bolstering the fortunes of one of Saudi Arabia’s richest men.

title: Starmer to Meet Japan’s Takaichi as Fighter Jet Funding Sputters
title_cn: 随着战斗机资金的减少，斯塔默将与日本高一会面
summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will meet his Japanese counterpart Sanae Takaichi on Sunday as uncertainty mounts over their joint fighter jet program with Italy because of doubts about the UK’s commitment.

title: Global Capitalism Bets It All on AI Future Alarming Voters
title_cn: 全球资本主义将全部赌注押在人工智能的未来上，令选民震惊
summary: Days after filing confidentially to go public, Anthropic, the $965 billion artificial intelligence juggernaut that’s one of the fastest-growing startups of all time, dropped another bombshell.

title: Why the US Is Investing in Quantum Computing
title_cn: 美国为何投资量子计算
summary: The Trump administration is making another move into venture-style investing, taking equity stakes in nine quantum computing companies. IBM, the largest recipient of the investment, thinks that quantum systems could eventually solve problems involving drug discovery, financial markets, cybersecurity, logistics, and climate science that remain beyond the reach of classical computers. But while companies such as IBM and IonQ claim major breakthroughs are near, former IBM CEO Sam Palmisano questions the government’s role in choosing specific corporate winners and warns that commercial adoption may still take years to realize.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: We’re All on Starship Elon Now
title_cn: 我们现在都在埃隆星舰上
summary: SpaceX is coming to a mutual fund or 401(k) near you.

title: US and Iran Agree to Halt War, Restart Middle East Oil Shipments
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意停止战争，重启中东石油运输
summary: The US and Iran said they reached an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, halting a war that killed thousands of people and setting the stage for 60 days of negotiations on the fate of Tehran’s nuclear program.

title: Trump Leaves the Hard Part for Later in Long-Awaited Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普将期待已久的伊朗协议中的困难部分留到稍后处理
summary: The US and Iran needed more than two months of fitful, strained negotiations to agree on a deal to halt their fighting and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Now comes the hard part.

title: Trump Hosts UFC Fights at White House for 80th Birthday
title_cn: 特朗普在白宫举办 UFC 比赛庆祝 80 岁生日
summary: Donald Trump will head to France for what will likely be contentious discussions with world leaders this week, but first he celebrated his 80th birthday by watching a sport that’s more brutal and bloody than politics.

title: Kyiv Comes Under Russian Attack Hours After Putin-Trump Call
title_cn: 普京与特朗普通话数小时后基辅遭到俄罗斯袭击
summary: Ukrainian cities, including Kyiv, came under Russian drone and missile attack early Monday, hours after Vladimir Putin and Donald Trump held a phone call.

title: US and Iran Reach Deal to Halt the War, Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国和伊朗达成协议停止战争并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
summary: An F-35B Lighting II takes off from the flight deck of America-class amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli on May 13, 2026.

title: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Confirms Deal Reached With US
title_cn: 伊朗副外长确认与美国达成协议
summary: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Gharibabadi confirms the country reached a peace deal with the US.

title: Starmer to Confirm Social Media Ban for UK Teens Ahead of G7
title_cn: 斯塔默将在七国集团峰会前确认英国青少年社交媒体禁令
summary: Keir Starmer will start a crucial week for his premiership by announcing a package of strong restrictions designed to protect British teenagers from online threats.

title: Takaichi Hails UK Defense Ties Despite Jet Uncertainty
title_cn: 尽管喷气式飞机存在不确定性，高市仍赞扬英国防务关系
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi hailed increasing defense cooperation with the UK during a meeting with her British counterpart Keir Starmer on Sunday, even amid uncertainty about a new fighter jet program.

title: Trump Ties Spy Powers Extension to Controversial Voter ID Bill
title_cn: 特朗普将间谍权力延期与有争议的选民身份法案联系起来
summary: President Donald Trump said he is opposed to having Congress renew now-expired spy powers for US intelligence agencies unless lawmakers also pass a controversial voter identification bill.

title: Iran Pushes Differing Deal Versions as US Sticks to Timeline
title_cn: 美国坚守时间表，伊朗推动不同版本的协议
summary: Iran circulated competing versions of a proposed interim agreement with the US, even as President Donald Trump stuck to his Sunday timeline to sign a deal.

title: Senator McConnell Hospitalized for Second Time This Year
title_cn: 参议员麦康奈尔今年第二次住院
summary: Senator Mitch McConnell, the longest-serving Senate Republican leader, was admitted to a hospital Sunday morning, his spokesperson said.

title: Trump Speaks With Putin, Zelenskyy Even as Peace Talks on Hold
title_cn: 和平谈判搁置之际，特朗普仍与普京、泽连斯基通话
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin and Donald Trump held a “friendly and frank” phone call on the US president’s birthday, the Kremlin said. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy also spoke with Trump.

title: Switzerland Rejects Proposal to Cap Population at 10 Million
title_cn: 瑞士拒绝人口上限为 1000 万的提议
summary: Switzerland rejected a proposal to cap its population at 10 million people, as warnings about economic damage if the radical measure was introduced outweighed concerns about immigration.

title: Trump Tells Israel to Stop as Lebanon Attacks Risk Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普要求以色列停止，因为黎巴嫩袭击威胁伊朗协议
summary: US President Donald Trump’s aim of getting an interim peace deal with Iran signed on Sunday looked increasingly unlikely following Israeli attacks on Hezbollah sites in Lebanon’s capital.

title: New York Mayor Mamdani on Knicks’ First NBA Title in 53 Years
title_cn: 纽约市长马姆达尼谈尼克斯队 53 年来首次夺得 NBA 冠军
summary: The New York Knicks ended one of the longest championship droughts in the NBA, bringing relief to their long-suffering fans. New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani discusses the "incredible" win and the upcoming ticker tape parade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Steps Up Migrant Arrests as Violent Protests Flare
title_cn: 随着暴力抗议的爆发，南非加大了对移民的逮捕力度
summary: South Africa’s government announced the recent arrest of thousands of undocumented migrants as it sought to keep a lid on growing protests against foreigners stoked by factors including rampant crime and unemployment.

title: Iran Signals No Deal Will Be Signed by Trump’s Sunday Timeline
title_cn: 伊朗暗示特朗普周日时间表不会签署任何协议
summary: Iran pushed back on US President Donald Trump’s assertion an interim peace deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz was imminent, as an Israeli strike on Lebanon posed a potential new risk to any agreement.

title: Why Mexico’s New Election Law Worries Democracy Advocates
title_cn: 为什么墨西哥的新选举法令民主倡导者感到担忧
summary: Lawmakers in Mexico have approved a constitutional change backed by President Claudia Sheinbaum’s ruling Morena party that would allow election results to be voided if the government believes that foreign influence on the vote affected the outcome.

title: Italy’s Far-Right Group Becomes Party in Fresh Threat to Meloni
title_cn: 意大利极右翼组织成为对梅洛尼构成新威胁的政党
summary: Futuro Nazionale, the far-right movement that’s drawn lawmakers away from Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni’s coalition, has formally become a party, now posing one of the largest risks to her reelection.

title: Breakaway Somalia Region’s President Makes First Israel Visit
title_cn: 分离的索马里地区总统首次访问以色列
summary: The president of Somaliland is making his first visit to Israel, following the Jewish state’s recognition of the breakaway region of Somalia.

title: Israel Bombs Beirut Citing Hezbollah Drones as US-Iran Near Deal
title_cn: 以色列轰炸贝鲁特，称美伊接近达成协议，真主党无人机使用
summary: Israel bombed Lebanon’s capital in what it said was retaliation for drone incursions by Hezbollah, escalating tensions as the US and the militia’s patron Iran near an interim peace deal.

title: Streeting Pledges Global Talent Drive, North Sea Investment Plan
title_cn: Streeting 承诺全球人才驱动、北海投资计划
summary: UK leadership challenger Wes Streeting will outline plans to recruit 20,000 scientists, engineers and artificial intelligence specialists to the UK and channel future North Sea energy tax revenues into household decarbonization projects, as the Labour member plans to set out an economic growth strategy next week.

title: Ukraine Targets Russian Chemical Plant, Fuel Depot in Strikes
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击俄罗斯化工厂和燃料库
summary: Ukrainian forces targeted a Russian fertilizer and chemical plant in the Tula region and an oil storage facility in the Yaroslavl region, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said, the latest in a series of strikes deep within Russia.

title: UK Forces Board Sanctioned Tanker in Russian Shadow-Fleet Raid
title_cn: 英国军队在俄罗斯影子舰队袭击中登上制裁油轮
summary: British forces boarded a sanctioned oil tanker in the English Channel early on Sunday, the first UK-led operation of its kind targeting Russia’s so-called shadow fleet.

title: Trump Eyes Sunday Iran Deal But Tehran Says Still Reviewing Text
title_cn: 特朗普周日关注伊朗协议，但德黑兰表示仍在审查文本
summary: US President Donald Trump said an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the conflict with Iran would be signed on Sunday, a claim contradicted by Iran as the two sides still differ over key points, including management of the waterway and payments to the Islamic Republic.

title: Romania’s Dan Picks Vestea to Form Government as Tomac Quits
title_cn: 托马克辞职后，罗马尼亚丹选择维斯蒂亚组建政府
summary: Romania’s president unexpectedly swapped his premier nomination on Sunday, exposing fresh strains inside pro-European forces and risking further turmoil.
